title: Integrating Float with Monday.com
excerpt: Hi everyone, I’m wondering if anyone has integrated Monday.com with Float? We have a time and resource management requirement that is currently managed in Float - it’s super flexible and robust, but it doesn’t connect to…

posts.author: StevenLong (Steven Long)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone, I’m wondering if anyone has integrated Monday.com with Float? We have a time and resource management requirement that is currently managed in Float - it’s super flexible and robust, but it doesn’t connect to Monday which is causing some manual work. Has anyone done this integration before and willing to have a chat or share ideas? Thanks, Steve

posts.author: ggrimaldo (Giselle)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Steven, curious if you were able to dig deeper into this integration between Monday and Float? I’m looking to try this out myself for a client that utilizes Monday, but needs something more robust for resource management specifically. I’m seeing that Zapier can connect the two, but would love any insights you may have if you were able to test this out.

posts.author: StevenLong (Steven Long)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Giselle,

Unfortunately, I didn’t get very far at all! I couldn’t find anything in any of the Monday documentation, or online, and since then, the float integration has been pushed down the list of priorities for now.

Sorry that I can’t help any further, but if you do manage to find something, it would be fantastic if you could share any findings with me!

Thanks,
Steve

Steven Long
